Package org.apache.juneau.bean.hal

Class HalResource

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal.HalResource
@Marshalled public class HalResource extends Object
Represents a HAL Resource Object as defined by draft-kelly-json-hal-08 § 4.

A HAL Resource carries three pieces of state:

  • The reserved _links member - a map of relation name to either a single HalLink or a HalLinkArray.
  • The reserved _embedded member - a map of relation name to either a single HalResource or a HalResourceArray (sub-resources). HAL embeddings are conceptually a tree; cyclic _embedded graphs are rejected by Juneau's BeanTraverseContext by default.
  • Arbitrary payload fields, set via the dynamic set(String,Object) method (uses the @BeanProp("*") extra-properties triplet, the same pattern used by OpenApiElement and SwaggerElement).
Example:

HalResource order = new HalResource() .addLink("self", new HalLink().setHref("/orders/123")) .addLinks("curies", new HalLink().setName("acme").setHref("https://acme.example/{rel}").setTemplated(true)) .set("total", 99.50); String json = JsonSerializer.DEFAULT.serialize(order);

See Also:
  • HAL Specification
  • draft-kelly-json-hal-08
  • juneau-bean-hal

  • Constructor Details

    • HalResource

      public HalResource()
      Default constructor.

  • Method Details

    • getLinks

      @BeanProp("_links") @Swap(HalLinkOrArraySwap.class) public Map<String,Object> getLinks()
      Bean property getter: _links.

      The reserved _links member. Each map value is either a single HalLink (rendered as a JSON object on the wire) or a HalLinkArray (rendered as a JSON array).

      Returns:
      The value of the _links property, or null if it is not set.

    • setLinks

      @BeanProp("_links") @Swap(HalLinkOrArraySwap.class) public HalResource setLinks(Map<String,Object> value)
      Bean property setter: _links.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property. Can be null to unset.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • addLink

      public HalResource addLink(String relation, HalLink value)
      Convenience method that adds a single link under the given relation.

      If a value already exists for relation, it is replaced with the supplied single link. To accumulate multiple links under the same relation use addLinks(String, HalLink...) instead.

      Parameters:
      relation - The link relation (e.g. "self", "next", "curies").
      value - The link to set.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • addLinks

      public HalResource addLinks(String relation, HalLink... values)
      Convenience method that appends one or more links to a HalLinkArray stored under relation.

      If the current value at relation is a single HalLink, it is promoted to a HalLinkArray containing the original link and the appended ones.

      Parameters:
      relation - The link relation.
      values - The links to append.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • getEmbedded

      @BeanProp("_embedded") @Swap(HalResourceOrArraySwap.class) public Map<String,Object> getEmbedded()
      Bean property getter: _embedded.

      The reserved _embedded member. Each map value is either a single HalResource or a HalResourceArray.

      Returns:
      The value of the _embedded property, or null if it is not set.

    • setEmbedded

      @BeanProp("_embedded") @Swap(HalResourceOrArraySwap.class) public HalResource setEmbedded(Map<String,Object> value)
      Bean property setter: _embedded.

      Note: HAL embeddings are conceptually a tree, not a graph. Juneau's BeanTraverseContext throws on cyclic references by default, which matches the spec.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property. Can be null to unset.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • addEmbedded

      public HalResource addEmbedded(String relation, HalResource value)
      Convenience method that embeds a single sub-resource under the given relation.
      Parameters:
      relation - The relation name.
      value - The sub-resource.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • addEmbedded

      public HalResource addEmbedded(String relation, HalResource... values)
      Convenience method that appends one or more sub-resources to a HalResourceArray stored under relation.
      Parameters:
      relation - The relation name.
      values - The sub-resources to append.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • extraKeys

      @BeanProp("*") public Set<String> extraKeys()
      Generic property keyset.
      Returns:
      All the payload (non-_links, non-_embedded) property names on this resource. Never null.

    • get

      @BeanProp("*") public Object get(String property)
      Generic property getter.
      Parameters:
      property - The property name. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      The property value, or null if the property is not set.

    • set

      @BeanProp("*") public HalResource set(String property, Object value)
      Generic property setter.

      Use this to set arbitrary payload fields alongside _links and _embedded.

      Parameters:
      property - The property name. Must not be null.
      value - The new value for the property.
      Returns:
      This object.
